name: image-seo
description: > Image SEO audit — make a site's images discoverable in Google Images and stop them from dragging down Core Web Vitals. Audits alt text quality and coverage, descriptive file names, modern formats (WebP/AVIF), dimensions and compression, responsive srcset, lazy-loading, explicit width/height (CLS), image sitemaps, and ImageObject structured data. Use this skill whenever the user asks about image SEO, alt text, Google Images ranking, image optimization for search, image file size hurting page sp
author: nowork-studio
